subject: Fixing the maven-deploy version in has
commit_message:
Fixing the maven-deploy version in has

Change-Id: Ia60a93f509c3f297d2e0edd5f1a536e553909da9
Signed-off-by: vrvarma <vv8305@att.com>
Issue-ID: OPTFRA-645

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Build Successful 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/optf-has-master-verify-java/361/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/optf-has-master-verify-java/361
Change has been successfully merged by Shankaranarayanan Puzhavakath Narayanan

Patch Set 1:

Already merged - bit too fast? 

Shankar, can you explain why exactly was this change necessary?

Patch Set 1:

the maven-deploy-plugin doesnt correlate with the python version. doesnt have 3.8 versionId.

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> Already merged - bit too fast? 
> 
> Shankar, can you explain why exactly was this change necessary?

The merge job was failing as it wasn't able to find the mvi-plugin of this version number.
